data.content: Plan attached. Existing tests already cover Loom prompt sourcing at unit/integration layers, so implementation should focus on final claim-surface regression coverage: builtin default workflow, claim rendering, profile-specific branch-vs-PR wording, and builtin/custom multi-workflow coexistence. Children created: `knots-6d98` for the Rust CLI regression matrix and `knots-374f` for rendered-output validation. Both are blocked by `knots-5464`, which is the unresolved per-step output-target dependency. Recommended implementation shape is a focused Rust integration suite plus a minimal rendered fixture verified with Playwright MCP `browser_snapshot`/`browser_evaluate`, followed by `make sanity`.
